title: Folder operations could fail without operator feedback
observed: Chooser, reveal, and output creation had unhandled or unchecked failure paths.
expected_boundary: Operator-visible status derives from the Electron or ACP result.
failure_mechanism: Fire-and-forget async callbacks were treated as completion.
break_it_angle: Reject chooser/output IPC or return false from reveal.
impact: Operators cannot distinguish failure from completion and may retain unavailable folders.

mitigation.minimal_repair: Catch all paths and require reveal/write result booleans.
mitigation.local_guardrail: Do not mutate the draft after a failed chooser.
mitigation.behavior_test: Unavailable folder paths show a recovery reason.

implementation_assessment.rationale: Three UI handlers share one diagnostic boundary.

confidence_calibration.rationale: The missing catch/boolean checks were deterministic source properties.

skill_escalation.reason: IPC rejection and unavailable paths trigger the defect.

title: Secret-shaped provider errors were rendered verbatim
observed: Credential and provider Error.message values crossed directly into renderer feedback.
expected_boundary: Actionable diagnostics never reproduce credential values.
failure_mechanism: The general error formatter performed no secret redaction.
impact: Credential values can appear in the UI, screenshots, or copied diagnostics.

mitigation.minimal_repair: Redact secret assignments, bearer/provider tokens, and serialized values.
mitigation.local_guardrail: Clear secret component state after success, failure, or cancel.
mitigation.behavior_test: Sentinel error and input value are absent after failure.

implementation_assessment.rationale: One renderer utility and credential regression cover the boundary.

confidence_calibration.rationale: The sentinel test reproduced the renderer path and verifies repair.

skill_escalation.reason: The workflow defect exposes credential material.

title: Optimistic session rows dropped pinned workspace identity
observed: The local new-session projection omitted workspace ID/name until polling.
expected_boundary: Local and backend session projections expose identical pinned ownership.
failure_mechanism: The new fields were omitted from one projection seam.
break_it_angle: Inspect a new sidebar row before the first ACP list poll.
impact: Sidebar grouping and visible ownership can transiently disagree with persistence.

mitigation.minimal_repair: Project workspace ID and snapshot name.

confidence_calibration.rationale: The omitted object fields were deterministic.

skill_escalation.reason: A producer/consumer projection lost contract fields.

title: Workspace refreshes reset an intentional temporary working directory
observed: Any backend refetch replaced Hub workingDir because the workspace object identity changed.
expected_boundary: Only a workspace switch or followed-primary edit replaces the default; a one-off override persists.
failure_mechanism: Object refresh was conflated with an operator default change.
break_it_angle: Choose /tmp/one-off then trigger profile or multi-window refresh.
impact: A new agent can read or write the wrong project directory.

mitigation.minimal_repair: Compare IDs and the previously followed primary path.
mitigation.local_guardrail: Preserve a path that differs from the previous primary.

implementation_assessment.rationale: A pure reconciliation rule plus Hub integration is sufficient.

confidence_calibration.rationale: Context refetch deterministically creates a new active workspace object.

skill_escalation.reason: The wrong path can become a session's persisted effective working directory.

title: Workspace warning indicators hid the actionable reason
observed: Structured backend validation was reduced to a generic warning icon.
expected_boundary: The warning exposes the specific folder/credential recovery reason.
failure_mechanism: Validation issues were collapsed to a boolean.
break_it_angle: Inspect the accessible name for a missing primary folder.
impact: Keyboard and screen-reader operators cannot diagnose the warning in place.

mitigation.minimal_repair: Join validation messages into title and accessible name.
mitigation.local_guardrail: Keep Edit reachable through the keyboard menu.
mitigation.behavior_test: Warning name includes the relink reason.

implementation_assessment.rationale: One render path and accessibility assertion.

confidence_calibration.rationale: The rendered accessible name is asserted.

skill_escalation.reason: The defect primarily affects non-visual diagnosis.

title: Removing the default output left an invalid workspace draft
observed: The remove action did not transfer default status when another output remained.
expected_boundary: Supported editor actions preserve exactly one default output.
failure_mechanism: Collection deletion ignored a dependent selection invariant.
break_it_angle: Add a second output, remove the current default, and save.
impact: The next save fails despite a repairable, apparently valid remaining destination.

mitigation.minimal_repair: Promote the first remaining output when deleting the default.
mitigation.local_guardrail: Keep deleting the sole output disabled and backend-rejected.

confidence_calibration.rationale: The invalid state was deterministic and the repaired state is rendered in test.

skill_escalation.reason: The UI must preserve the backend exactly-one-default invariant.

title: Extension always-allow used an impossible post-consumption liveness check
observed: A successful consuming resolve was followed by a check that necessarily reported the request absent.
expected_boundary: A live request is consumed once before policy persistence; stale requests mutate nothing.
failure_mechanism: Consuming and non-consuming liveness checks were sequenced as though both could remain true.
break_it_angle: Use Always allow all tools on a live extension request.
impact: The tool proceeds once, durable extension permission is skipped, and UI reports stale state.

mitigation.minimal_repair: Use the resolve return as the liveness gate and remove the impossible second check.
mitigation.local_guardrail: Do not list or persist tools when resolve returns false.
mitigation.behavior_test: Live call order is resolve/list/persist; stale mutates nothing.

implementation_assessment.rationale: One contradictory check and existing focused tests.

confidence_calibration.rationale: The full suite reproduced the false-stale path before repair.

skill_escalation.reason: The workflow controls durable tool permission state.
